title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still haven't received the recovery email.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite having sufficient balance in the account.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button appears greyed out for their account.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city. They updated it in the profile settings, but the old address still appears on the latest invoice.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13. Reinstalling the app did not fix the issue.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago for a cancelled subscription but has not received the amount in their bank account yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number. They are locked out of their pro dashboard.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but gets an 'Upload failed' error every time, even with a small file size.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Error
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their yearly subscription but the toggle switch is disabled and non-clickable.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order for the Enterprise plan but didn't receive a confirmation email even though the payment was successful.

title: API Access Keys Revoked
description: Developer customer reports that their production API keys were suddenly revoked without any prior notification or policy violation.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Customer reports that the main dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load data. This issue started occurring since the last update.
